root_cause: Trace buffer allocation failed because the required trace buffer size (60899328B) exceeds the allocated trace region size (50000000B). The trace_region_size configuration parameter is too small for the model's trace requirements.
suggested_action: Increase trace_region_size in model spec override_tt_config to at least 61000000 (or 70000000 for safety margin) to accommodate trace buffer requirements for Qwen3-32B on P150x8.
